Cell AM22: ='Rateio Custos Fixos'!T28
Cell AN22: ='Rateio Custos Fixos'!U28

Cell AR22: =AO22+X22+P22

Cell AS33: =(AP33/H33)
Cell AT33: =AR33/H33
Cell AU33: =AP33/H33
Cell AV33: =(AR33*#REF!)/'Est. Cust. Naci.'!H33

Cell C45: ='LISTA DE COMPRAS'!C44
Cell G45: ='LISTA DE COMPRAS'!D45

Cell M45: =L45*50%
Cell N45: =$N$4*I45

Cell S45: =$Q45*S$5
Cell T45: =$Q45*T$5

Cell J56: ='LISTA DE COMPRAS'!K55
Cell K56: =H56*J56
Cell L56: =K56*$L$4
Cell M56: =L56*50%
Cell N56: =$N$4*I56
Cell O56: ='Rateio Custos Fixos'!E62
Cell P56: =SUM(L56,O56)
Cell Q56: =P56+R56
Cell R56: =$P56*R$5
Cell S56: =$Q56*S$5
Cell T56: =$Q56*T$5
Cell U56: =$Q56*U$5
Cell V56: =$P56*V$5

Cell G2: =F2*B3

Cell N66: =SUM(N12:N65)

--------------------------------------------------
